rationale: Li et al. (2005) is cited in the model-development section rather than only in broad background. The citation is used when introducing a latent-continuum representation for comment location in the venue-choice model, indicating methodological borrowing. Although it appears in a grouped citation, the function is explicit and connected to a key modeling component, so it is more than a passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Li et al. (2005) as methodological precedent for a latent-continuum representation and adapts that idea to define comment location (VenLoc) in its venue-format choice model. This is a transfer of modeling logic, not an extension of the original banking cross-selling application.
